【首页】内容应突出核心价值主张、产品/服务亮点、主要卖点；文案简短有力，适合首屏与首屏以下关键区块；注重转化与品牌印象。
[Homepage] The content should highlight the core value proposition, product/service highlights, and main selling points; the copywriting should be short and powerful, suitable for key areas on and below the first screen; focus on conversion and brand impression.

【关于我们】内容应包含：公司/品牌介绍、使命与愿景、核心团队或创始人、发展历程/里程碑、核心价值观或特色；语气专业且富有亲和力。
[About Us] The content should include: company/brand introduction, mission and vision, core team or founders, development history/milestones, core values ​​or features; the tone is professional and approachable.

【联系我们】内容应包含：联系表单说明、客服/销售邮箱与电话、办公地址、营业时间、常见联系方式提示；确保用户能快速找到联系渠道。
[Contact Us] content should include: contact form description, customer service/sales email and phone number, office address, business hours, and common contact information tips; ensure that users can quickly find contact channels.

【隐私政策】内容应包含：数据收集范围、使用目的、存储与安全措施、用户权利（访问/更正/删除）、第三方共享说明、Cookie 与追踪说明、政策更新方式。
[Privacy Policy] content should include: data collection scope, purpose of use, storage and security measures, user rights (access/correction/deletion), third-party sharing instructions, cookie and tracking instructions, and policy update methods.

【服务条款】内容应包含：服务范围与说明、用户责任与禁止行为、知识产权、免责声明、争议解决、条款变更通知。
[Terms of Service] content should include: scope and description of service, user responsibilities and prohibited actions, intellectual property, disclaimer, dispute resolution, and notice of terms changes.

【退款政策】内容应包含：退款适用条件、申请流程与时限、退款方式与到账时间、不可退款情形、客服联系方式。
[Refund Policy] content should include: applicable conditions for refund, application process and time limit, refund method and arrival time, non-refundable situations, and customer service contact information.

【配送政策】内容应包含：配送范围、配送时效、配送费用说明、物流跟踪、签收与退货相关说明。
[Delivery policy] content should include: delivery scope, delivery time, delivery fee description, logistics tracking, receipt and return related instructions.

【Cookie 政策】内容应包含：Cookie 用途与类型、必要与非必要 Cookie 说明、用户如何管理与禁用 Cookie、第三方 Cookie 说明。
[Cookie Policy] content should include: Cookie purposes and types, necessary and non-essential Cookie instructions, how users manage and disable Cookies, and third-party Cookie instructions.

【博客文章】内容为单篇文章正文：标题、引言、分段正文、配图占位提示；符合博客文章风格与可读性。
[Blog article] The content is the text of a single article: title, introduction, segmented text, and picture placeholder tips; it conforms to the style and readability of blog articles.

【博客列表】内容为列表页说明：栏目介绍、文章摘要展示说明；引导用户浏览文章列表。
[Blog List] contains the list page description: column introduction, article summary display instructions; guides users to browse the article list.

【博客分类】内容为分类介绍：该分类主题说明、典型内容范围；引导用户浏览该分类下文章。
[Blog Classification] The content is a classification introduction: description of the topic of this classification and typical content range; guide users to browse articles under this classification.

【自定义页面】根据页面描述生成符合主题的完整内容；结构清晰、信息完整。
[Customized page] Generate complete content that matches the theme based on the page description; the structure is clear and the information is complete.

域名池子管理的工作原理指南
Guide to how domain pool sub-management works

域名池用于集中管理可建站的具体域名（如 www.example.com），从购买、解析到 HTTPS 与建站就绪的完整流程如下：
Domain pool is used to centrally manage specific domains that can host websites (e.g., www.example.com). The complete process from purchase, resolution, to HTTPS and website readiness is as follows:

在根域列表中购买或从注册商拉取域名。
Purchase domains from the root domain list or pull them from the registrar.

将域名解析到本服务器 IP（可在此处切换 DNS 供应商并推送记录）。
Resolve the domain to this server's IP (you can switch DNS providers and push records here).

在根域列表中勾选「解析到本机」的域名，点击「转存到域名池」入池。
In the root domain list, check the domains set to "Resolve to Localhost" and click "Transfer to Domain Pool" to add them to the pool.

系统定时任务会定期检测池内域名的解析状态、HTTPS 证书与建站就绪状态。
The system scheduled task will periodically check the resolution status, HTTPS certificate, and site readiness of domains in the pool.

当解析正常且 HTTPS 有效时，域名标记为建站就绪，可用于建站或分配。
When resolution is normal and HTTPS is valid, the domain is marked as ready for site building and can be used for site creation or assignment.

安装定时任务后，池内状态会自动更新；未安装时请执行
